findings.issue: The product/quotient forward reference is phrased a little too absolutely.
findings.evidence: “What we still cannot differentiate are products and quotients of functions” could be read as saying no product or quotient can be handled at all, even though some can be rewritten with the rules already proved.
findings.suggestion: Soften to “What we still do not have are general rules for products and quotients.”

summary: No blocking findings. The draft is mathematically faithful to the seed and covers the direction brief’s required items without adding a forbidden proof, figure, strategy box, or bare exercise.
